architecture:
SalesGRU(
  (input_proj): Sequential(
    (0): Linear(in_features=1, out_features=192, bias=True)
    (1): GELU(approximate='none')
    (2): LayerNorm((192,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
  )
  (gru): GRU(192, 192, num_layers=2, batch_first=True, dropout=0.09902074812857853)
  (norm): LayerNorm((192,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
  (decoder): HorizonConditionedHead(
    (attn): MultiheadAttention(
      (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=192, out_features=192, bias=True)
    )
    (norm): LayerNorm((192,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    (res): ResidualForecastHead(
      (block): Sequential(
        (0): Linear(in_features=192, out_features=192, bias=True)
        (1): GELU(approximate='none')
        (2): Dropout(p=0.09902074812857853, inplace=False)
        (3): Linear(in_features=192, out_features=192, bias=True)
      )
      (norm): LayerNorm((192,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    )
    (out): Linear(in_features=192, out_features=1, bias=True)
  )
)
